docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,184.50 FILED BY PUNTEL, DAVID ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL C. UCHIYAMA, KAREN Y. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUNTEL, DAVID ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL C. UCHIYAMA, KAREN Y. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $822.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, CARL C. UCHIYAMA, KAREN Y.
